name: safeHref
description:
Validates an attribute value and returns it only when the value is safe to
render. Delegates to `DOMPurify.isValidAttribute` in the browser; falls back
to a minimal scheme allow-list under SSR.

params.name: tag
params.description: Element name the value will be applied to (e.g. `'a'`, `'img'`)

returns.description: The original value if safe, `undefined` if blocked

title: safeHref
